docs.title: mq-rest-admin-common
docs.text: Shared documentation fragments and canonical mapping data for the mq-rest-admin project family.

docs.title: What this repository provides
docs.text:
• Documentation fragments — language-neutral explanations of architecture, mapping pipeline, design decisions, and high-level patterns (ensure, sync) that are composed into per-language documentation sites.
  • Canonical mapping data — the single source of truth for mapping-data.json, which defines the bidirectional attribute mappings between developer-friendly names and native MQSC parameters.
  • Qualifier mapping reference — auto-generated documentation for all 41 MQSC qualifier mappings.

docs.title: Documentation sections
docs.text:
• Design — design rationale, runCommandJSON endpoint, nested object flattening
  • Mappings — per-qualifier attribute mapping reference (41 qualifiers)
  • AI Engineering — transparency statement and AI-assisted development practices
  • Development — local MQ container setup for integration testing

docs.title: Design
docs.text:
This section documents the design decisions and rationale behind the mq-rest-admin library family.

  • Design Rationale — why the library exists and how its API was shaped
  • runCommandJSON Endpoint — the IBM MQ REST API endpoint that all operations target
  • Nested Object Flattening — how nested objects arrays are transparently flattened
